narrative:
Twinsburg 2-A (precinct in Summit County) has 806 registered voters, with 51.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 30.6%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 12.4 percentage points.
